LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MICHAEL SHKLOVSKY'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1324. PLAINTIFF'S SUPPORTING DECLARATION FAILS TO EXPLAIN WHY THE PROPOSED AMENDMENTS ARE BEING RAISED AT THIS TIME. THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY AND THE PROPOSED AMENDMENTS CHANGE THE THEORY/TENOR OF THE CASE. PLAINTIFF HAS UNREASONABLY DELAYED SEEKING AMENDMENT AND ALLOWING THE AMENDMENT AT THIS POINT OF THE LITIGATION WOULD PREJUDICE DEFENDANT. SEE FISHER V. LARSEN (1982) 138 CAL.APP.3D 627, 649. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: SUZANNE BOLANOS; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER : MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 =302/SB

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-22-2016 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-25-2015 Continued To Mar-14-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendant Citibanks Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Deposition
Off Calendar Oct-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearance by any party or counsel, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Citibank's unopposed motion to compel discovery responses and deposition is GRANTED. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Naomi Jane Gray, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2015 Off Calendar: Trial De Novo Filed

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-27-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF MICHAEL SHKLOVSKY'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is denied. Defendant's motion does not comply with CRC 3.1324. Plaintiff's supporting declaration fails to explain why the proposed amendments are being raised at this time. The motion is untimely and the proposed amendments change the theory/tenor of the case. Plaintiff has unreasonably delayed seeking amendment and allowing the amendment at this point of the litigation would prejudice defendant. See Fisher v. Larsen (1982) 138 Cal.App.3d 627, 649. Order signed. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/sb

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-11-2015 Continued To Aug-27-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF MICHAEL SHKLOVSKY'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is continued to August 27, 2015, to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 11, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/eg
